caution: Applies broadly to split AC/heat pump model numbers, but always verify.

rule: GSZ14 is Goodman 14 SEER-class split heat pump family using R-410A; GSZ140301 is 30,000 BTU / 2.5 ton single-phase pattern.
caution: Exact suffix/revision matters for parts and wiring.

rule: Service manuals are generally for trained HVAC technicians only; homeowners should use owner manuals and call a licensed pro for electrical, refrigerant, gas, or combustion work.
caution: Use safety note in RoofingHut answers.

rule: Most water heater brands encode manufacture date in serial number, but each brand differs.
caution: Use brand-specific age lookup before advising replacement age.

rule: Common terminals: R/Rc/Rh 24V, C common, Y compressor, G fan, W/Aux heat, O/B reversing valve.
caution: Heat pumps require careful O/B and aux heat setup.

rule: Panel, breaker, transfer switch, surge protector, EV charger and generator wiring should be handled by qualified/licensed electricians.
caution: Never present dangerous electrical work as DIY.
